'''Ral'Rai Muvunc''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] serving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as the [[Minister of Supply/Legends|head]] of [[Ordnance and Supply/Legends|Ordnance and Supply]] (OaS) during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
===Rebellion era===
As head of OaS, Muvunc ranked as one of the seven [[Supreme Allied Commanders|Supreme Commanders]] in the military [[Alliance High Command/Legends|High Command]], but he seems also to have served as [[Minister of Supply/Legends|Minister of Supply]] in the civilian government.

[[File:RalRaiMuvuncSignature-PiratesAndPrivateers.png|thumb|left|250px|Ral'Rai Muvunc's signature as written on a [[Letter of marque/Legends|letter of marque and reprisal]]]]

Among his other duties, Muvunc was one of the handful of senior personnel with authority to hire [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] to serve the Rebel cause, and in contrast to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] of [[Rebel Fleet Command/Legends|Fleet Command]], he was an enthusiastic supporter of this policy. Muvunc issued [[Letter of marque/Legends|letters of marque and reprisal]] to many Rebel privateers, including [[Chaeloe Dantin]].

===New Republic era===
Following the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] tasked Muvunc with aiding industrial [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had withdrawn from in the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. These planets were often isolated and left in ecological tatters by the Empire, with no native food supply, so Muvunc began sending negotiating teams to free [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural worlds]] to make arrangements to supply these famine-stricken worlds with food. One such team was sent in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] to [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]] in the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]].<ref name="Kaal">{{JournalCite|7|The Kaal Connection}}</ref>

Ral'Rai Muvunc later became [[Minister of Commerce]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he negotiated the surrender of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] and its [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|shipyards]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Taking of Kuat]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Kaal Connection]]'' erroneously identifies this character as a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], and gives his name as "Ral-Rai Muvnc."
